g.title: FusedAttentionWSControl
g.text: Command decode, 25-state main FSM, score postprocessing, softmax passes, and writeback

g.title: legend
g.text: Dashed arrows: concurrent side effects or explanatory dataflow notes
Amber nodes: RoCC command cases decoded from
Blue nodes: Q fill, shared B/V fill, and QK compute phase
Gray nodes: idle, quantize, writeback, and response

g.title: buffers_note
g.text: during Q/QK it stores packed Q rows, indexed by
after softmax it is reused to store probabilities, with
stores either K tile columns or V columns, depending on
full post-scaled, causal-masked QK score matrix for all
live MAC accumulation buffer for both QK and PV mesh phases

g.title: score_post_note
g.text: raw fixed-point QK partial sums in
into fixed-point, multiply each accumulated score, then shift by

g.title: softmax_note
g.text: reload the same scores, compute normalized probabilities
PV reuse is achieved by turning the normalized attention matrix into the new A-side input buffer

g.title: capture_note
g.text: both QK and PV compute phases; explicit wait states simply stall until enough rows have retired

g.title: cmd_set_dims
g.text: unpack those fields into the corresponding registers, set

g.title: cmd_run
g.text: addresses configured, dims configured, all dimensions nonzero, and
1 if config missing, 2 if dims invalid, else 0
zero the Q/B fill indices, tile base, compute counters, feed/capture counters, softmax counters, and

g.title: cmd_status
g.text: respData = Cat(..., busy, dimsConfigured, addrsConfigured, inResp)
bit 0 = in response state, bit 1 = address config complete, bit 2 = dimension config complete, bit 3 = busy

g.title: resp
g.text: return the prepared result on the RoCC response channel

g.title: req_fill_q
g.text: issue the next packed-Q read beat

g.title: idle
g.text: quiescent state; only place where a new RoCC command is accepted

g.title: wait_fill_q
g.text: consume one packed-Q read response beat into
each valid returned word lane expands into

g.title: qk_setup_tile
g.text: choose the next KV-column tile for QK

g.title: req_fill_b
g.text: issue a packed read beat for either K tiles or V vectors

g.title: wait_fill_b
g.text: consume one packed read response beat into
each valid returned word lane expands into

g.title: qk_prep_chunk
g.text: decide whether another QK chunk is needed
QK MACs for this KV tile are finished, so go store postprocessed scores

g.title: pv_prep_chunk
g.text: decide whether another PV chunk is needed
PV MACs are done, so start output quantization/packing

g.title: wait_fill_b->pv_prep_chunk
g.text: d.fire and nextIdx >= bFillCount and bFillForPV

g.title: qk_load_weights
g.text: pulse mesh weight loading for one QK chunk

g.title: qk_store_scores
g.text: commit the BF16 postprocessed QK outputs for the current KV tile into
for valid query rows and active columns,
and go load the next K tile
, clear the softmax row/col accumulators, and start softmax row processing

g.title: qk_feed_rows
g.text: into the mesh for the current QK chunk

g.title: qk_wait_chunk_out
g.text: wait for all output rows of the current QK chunk to retire

g.title: softmax_row_init
g.text: reset softmax working registers for one query row

g.title: softmax_p1_load
g.text: -wide score slice of the current query row into

g.title: softmax_p1_compute
g.text: update the running max and running denominator for the current query row
and loop back to load the next slice

g.title: softmax_p2_load
g.text: reload the same score slice for normalization
with the same out-of-range padding as pass 1

g.title: softmax_p2_compute
g.text: generate normalized BF16 probabilities and write them into
If row finished and last row:
If row finished and more rows remain:

g.title: pv_setup
g.text: repoint the shared B-fill path at V and prepare for probability-times-value computation

g.title: pv_load_weights
g.text: pulse mesh weight loading for one PV chunk

g.title: quantize_out
g.text: register the BF16-packed output words before TileLink writeback

g.title: pv_feed_rows
g.text: into the mesh for the current PV chunk

g.title: pv_wait_chunk_out
g.text: wait for all output rows of the current PV chunk to retire

g.title: req_put
g.text: , masked by valid write lanes in the current beat

g.title: wait_put
g.text: wait for the TileLink write acknowledgement for the current output beat
if more words remain, else set
